name: What evidence do I need for a claim that AI visibility service lied about rankings?

mainEntity.name: What evidence do I need for a claim that AI visibility service lied about rankings?

acceptedAnswer.description: Contracts, promises, analytics screenshots, witness emails, revenue loss data.[4] Key factors: false advertising proof; reliance damages; before/after metrics.[4] Archive web results; expert SEO testimony; comparative firm data.[4] Builds causation chain.
